passage_title: UK companies need more effective boards of directors

sentences.sentence: After a number of serious failures of governance (that is, how they are managed at the highest level), companies in Britain, as well as elsewhere, should consider radical changes to their directors' roles.
sentences.translation: 在出现多起严重的治理失败之后（也就是公司最高层面的管理方式出了问题），英国以及其他地区的公司都应考虑对董事角色作出根本性改变。

structure.text: After a number of serious failures of governance
that is, how they are managed at the highest level
companies in Britain, as well as elsewhere
should consider radical changes to their directors' roles

difficult_points: After 引出的介词短语说明提出改革建议的背景。
括号中的 that is 对 governance 作解释，说明这里指最高层面的公司管理。
as well as elsewhere 插入主语内部，表示论述不限于英国。
should consider 表示作者的建议语气，而非事实陈述。

sentences.sentence: It is clear that the role of a board director today is not an easy one.
sentences.translation: 显而易见，如今董事会董事的角色并不轻松。

structure.text: It is clear
that the role of a board director today is not an easy one
the role of a board director today
is not an easy one

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正内容由 that 从句表达。
one 代替前面的 role，避免重复。
today 放在名词短语末尾，限定现代董事角色。

sentences.sentence: Following the 2008 financial meltdown, which resulted in a deeper and more prolonged period of economic downturn than anyone expected, the search for explanations in the many post-mortems of the crisis has meant blame has been spread far and wide.
sentences.translation: 2008 年金融崩溃之后，危机后大量复盘都在寻找解释；这场危机导致的经济下行比任何人预想的都更深、更持久，而寻找原因也意味着责任被广泛归咎到各方。

structure.text: Following the 2008 financial meltdown
which resulted in a deeper and more prolonged period of economic downturn than anyone expected
the search for explanations in the many post-mortems of the crisis
has meant
blame has been spread far and wide

difficult_points: Following... 是介词短语，表示金融危机之后的背景。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 2008 年金融崩溃的结果。
than anyone expected 是比较结构，说明经济下行超出预期。
has meant 后接省略 that 的宾语从句，说明寻找解释带来的结果。

sentences.sentence: Governments, regulators, central banks and auditors have all been in the frame.
sentences.translation: 政府、监管机构、中央银行和审计师都被纳入了责任审视的范围。

structure.text: Governments, regulators, central banks and auditors
have all been in the frame

difficult_points: 复合主语列举多个被审视对象，说明责任追究范围很广。
have been 是现在完成时，表示这种被纳入审视的状态与危机复盘相连。
in the frame 是习语，意为“成为关注或怀疑对象”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 被列为责任对象；受到审视

sentences.sentence: The role of bank directors and management and their widely publicised failures have been extensively picked over and examined in reports, inquiries and commentaries.
sentences.translation: 银行董事和管理层的角色，以及他们被广泛报道的失败，已经在各种报告、调查和评论中被反复剖析和审视。

structure.text: The role of bank directors and management and their widely publicised failures
have been extensively picked over and examined
in reports, inquiries and commentaries

difficult_points: 主语由 The role... 和 failures 两部分并列构成，因此谓语用 have been。
have been picked over and examined 是现在完成时的被动结构，强调已被反复审视。
widely publicised 后置修饰 failures，说明这些失败被公众广泛知晓。

sentences.sentence: The knock-on effect of this scrutiny has been to make the governance of companies in general an issue of intense public debate and has significantly increased the pressures on, and the responsibilities of, directors.
sentences.translation: 这种审视的连锁影响，是使公司治理整体上成为公众激烈讨论的问题，并显著增加了董事所承受的压力和责任。

structure.text: The knock-on effect of this scrutiny
has been to make the governance of companies in general an issue of intense public debate
and has significantly increased the pressures on, and the responsibilities of, directors
the pressures on, and the responsibilities of, directors

difficult_points: knock-on effect 表示由前文 scrutiny 引发的连锁影响。
has been to make... 和 has increased... 是并列谓语，说明两个结果。
the pressures on, and the responsibilities of, directors 中 on 与 of 分别搭配 pressures 和 responsibilities。
in general 修饰 companies，表示公司治理整体。

sentences.sentence: At the simplest and most practical level, the time involved in fulfilling the demands of a board directorship has increased significantly, calling into question the effectiveness of the classic model of corporate governance by part-time, independent non-executive directors.
sentences.translation: 在最简单、最实际的层面上，满足董事会董事职位要求所需投入的时间已显著增加，这使人们质疑由兼职独立非执行董事组成的经典公司治理模式是否有效。

structure.text: At the simplest and most practical level
the time involved in fulfilling the demands of a board directorship
involved in fulfilling the demands of a board directorship
has increased significantly
calling into question the effectiveness of the classic model of corporate governance by part-time, independent non-executive directors

difficult_points: involved in... 是过去分词短语，修饰 time。
fulfilling the demands of... 表示满足董事职位要求，说明时间投入增加的来源。
calling into question... 是现在分词短语，表示前面事实导致的结果。
by part-time, independent non-executive directors 修饰 corporate governance 的经典模式。

expressions.text: at the simplest and most practical level
expressions.meaning_zh: 在最简单、最实际的层面

sentences.sentence: Where once a board schedule may have consisted of between eight and ten meetings a year, in many companies the number of events requiring board input and decisions has dramatically risen.
sentences.translation: 过去董事会日程可能一年只包括八到十次会议，而如今在许多公司，需要董事会投入和作出决定的事项数量已经大幅增加。

structure.text: Where once a board schedule may have consisted of between eight and ten meetings a year
in many companies
the number of events requiring board input and decisions
requiring board input and decisions
has dramatically risen

difficult_points: Where once... 在这里不是地点，而是对比过去与现在的情况。
may have consisted of 表示对过去典型情况的概括性推测。
requiring board input and decisions 是现在分词短语，修饰 events。
the number 作主语，谓语用单数 has risen。

sentences.sentence: Furthermore, the amount of reading and preparation required for each meeting is increasing.
sentences.translation: 此外，每次会议所需的阅读和准备工作量也在增加。

structure.text: Furthermore
the amount of reading and preparation required for each meeting
required for each meeting
is increasing

difficult_points: Furthermore 递进说明董事工作量增加的另一个方面。
the amount of... 作主语，谓语用单数 is。
required for each meeting 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 reading and preparation。

sentences.sentence: Agendas can become overloaded and this can mean the time for constructive debate must necessarily be restricted in favour of getting through the business.
sentences.translation: 议程可能变得过于拥挤，这可能意味着建设性讨论的时间必然要被压缩，以便完成各项事务。

structure.text: Agendas can become overloaded
and this can mean
the time for constructive debate must necessarily be restricted
in favour of getting through the business

difficult_points: this 回指议程过载这一情况，说明其后果。
mean 后接省略 that 的宾语从句，解释这会意味着什么。
must necessarily be restricted 是被动结构，强调讨论时间不得不被限制。
in favour of 表示为了优先完成事务而牺牲讨论。

sentences.sentence: Often, board business is devolved to committees in order to cope with the workload, which may be more efficient but can mean that the board as a whole is less involved in fully addressing some of the most important issues.
sentences.translation: 董事会事务常常被下放给各委员会以应对工作量，这样可能更高效，但也可能意味着董事会整体较少参与充分处理一些最重要的问题。

structure.text: Often
board business is devolved to committees
in order to cope with the workload
which may be more efficient but can mean
that the board as a whole is less involved in fully addressing some of the most important issues

difficult_points: is devolved to 是被动结构，表示事务被下放给委员会。
in order to... 表示目的，即为了应对工作量。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面“事务下放给委员会”的做法。
but can mean that... 表示效率提升背后可能带来的负面含义。

sentences.sentence: It is not uncommon for the audit committee meeting to last longer than the main board meeting itself.
sentences.translation: 审计委员会会议持续时间长于董事会主会议本身，这并不少见。

structure.text: It is not uncommon
for the audit committee meeting to last longer than the main board meeting itself
to last longer than the main board meeting itself

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正主语是不定式复合结构 for... to...。
not uncommon 是双重否定式表达，语气比 common 更委婉。
longer than... 构成比较，强调委员会会议甚至超过主董事会会议。

sentences.sentence: Process may take the place of discussion and be at the expense of real collaboration, so that boxes are ticked rather than issues tackled.
sentences.translation: 流程可能取代讨论，并以真正的协作为代价，结果只是完成了形式上的勾选，而问题并没有得到处理。

structure.text: Process
may take the place of discussion and be at the expense of real collaboration
so that boxes are ticked rather than issues tackled
boxes are ticked rather than issues tackled

difficult_points: take the place of 表示“取代”，说明流程压倒了讨论。
be at the expense of... 表示以真正协作为代价。
so that 引导结果状语从句，说明流程化带来的结果。
issues tackled 中省略了 are，与 boxes are ticked 构成并列被动。

sentences.sentence: A radical solution, which may work for some very large companies whose businesses are extensive and complex, is the professional board, whose members would work up to three or four days a week, supported by their own dedicated staff and advisers.
sentences.translation: 一种激进的解决方案是专业董事会；这种方案或许适用于一些业务广泛且复杂的大型公司，其成员每周最多工作三到四天，并由自己的专职员工和顾问支持。

structure.text: A radical solution
which may work for some very large companies whose businesses are extensive and complex
whose businesses are extensive and complex
is the professional board
whose members would work up to three or four days a week
supported by their own dedicated staff and advisers

difficult_points: 句子主干是 A radical solution is the professional board，中间插入多个定语从句。
第一个 which 从句说明该方案适用的公司类型，其中 whose 修饰 companies。
第二个 whose 从句修饰 the professional board，说明其成员工作时间。
supported by... 是过去分词短语，补充说明董事会成员获得的支持。

sentences.sentence: There are obvious risks to this and it would be important to establish clear guidelines for such a board to ensure that it did not step on the toes of management by becoming too engaged in the day-to-day running of the company.
sentences.translation: 这种做法显然存在风险，因此有必要为这样的董事会建立明确准则，以确保它不会因过度介入公司的日常运营而侵犯管理层职责。

structure.text: There are obvious risks to this
and it would be important to establish clear guidelines for such a board
to ensure that it did not step on the toes of management
that it did not step on the toes of management by becoming too engaged in the day-to-day running of the company
by becoming too engaged in the day-to-day running of the company

difficult_points: this 指代上一句提出的 professional board 模式。
it would be important to... 中 it 是形式主语，真正内容是不定式短语。
to ensure that... 表示建立准则的目的。
step on the toes of management 是比喻，指越界干涉管理层职责。

sentences.sentence: Problems of recruitment, remuneration and independence could also arise and this structure would not be appropriate for all companies.
sentences.translation: 招聘、薪酬和独立性方面的问题也可能出现，而且这种结构并不适合所有公司。

structure.text: Problems of recruitment, remuneration and independence
could also arise
and this structure would not be appropriate for all companies

difficult_points: Problems of... 用三个并列名词说明专业董事会可能带来的操作问题。
could also arise 表示潜在风险，而非已经发生的事实。
this structure 回指专业董事会结构，not... for all companies 表示适用范围有限。

sentences.sentence: However, more professional and better-informed boards would have been particularly appropriate for banks where the executives had access to information that part-time non-executive directors lacked, leaving the latter unable to comprehend or anticipate the 2008 crash.
sentences.translation: 然而，对于银行而言，更专业、信息更充分的董事会本来会特别合适，因为在银行中，高管能够获取兼职非执行董事缺乏的信息，这使后者无法理解或预见 2008 年的崩盘。

structure.text: However
more professional and better-informed boards
would have been particularly appropriate for banks
where the executives had access to information that part-time non-executive directors lacked
that part-time non-executive directors lacked
leaving the latter unable to comprehend or anticipate the 2008 crash

difficult_points: would have been 表示对过去情况的假设性评价：本来会合适。
where 引导定语从句修饰 banks，说明银行中的信息不对称。
that 从句修饰 information，指出兼职非执行董事缺乏哪些信息。
the latter 指前面两类人中的后者，即 part-time non-executive directors。

sentences.sentence: One of the main criticisms of boards and their directors is that they do not focus sufficiently on longer-term matters of strategy, sustainability and governance, but instead concentrate too much on short-term financial metrics.
sentences.translation: 对董事会及其董事的主要批评之一是，他们没有充分关注战略、可持续性和治理等较长期问题，而是过多集中于短期财务指标。

structure.text: One of the main criticisms of boards and their directors
is
that they do not focus sufficiently on longer-term matters of strategy, sustainability and governance
but instead concentrate too much on short-term financial metrics

difficult_points: One of... 作主语时谓语用单数 is。
that 引导表语从句，说明 criticism 的具体内容。
do not focus... but instead concentrate... 构成对比，突出董事会关注点失衡。
strategy, sustainability and governance 是 longer-term matters 的并列具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Regulatory requirements and the structure of the market encourage this behaviour.
sentences.translation: 监管要求和市场结构助长了这种行为。

structure.text: Regulatory requirements and the structure of the market
encourage this behaviour

difficult_points: 复合主语由 regulatory requirements 和 market structure 组成。
this behaviour 回指上一句中过度关注短期财务指标的做法。
encourage 在此表示制度和市场环境使该行为更容易发生。

sentences.sentence: The tyranny of quarterly reporting can distort board decision-making, as directors have to 'make the numbers' every four months to meet the insatiable appetite of the market for more data.
sentences.translation: 季度报告的强大压力可能扭曲董事会决策，因为董事们每四个月都必须“做出数字”，以满足市场对更多数据永不满足的需求。

structure.text: The tyranny of quarterly reporting
can distort board decision-making
as directors have to 'make the numbers' every four months
to meet the insatiable appetite of the market for more data

difficult_points: tyranny 是比喻，强调季度报告对决策形成强制性压力。
as 在这里引导原因状语从句，解释为什么决策会被扭曲。
'make the numbers' 是商业表达，指完成市场期待的财务数字。
to meet... 表示董事努力达成数字的目的。

sentences.sentence: This serves to encourage the trading methodology of a certain kind of investor who moves in and out of a stock without engaging in constructive dialogue with the company about strategy or performance, and is simply seeking a short-term financial gain.
sentences.translation: 这会鼓励某类投资者的交易方式：他们进出一只股票，却不与公司就战略或业绩进行建设性对话，只是在寻求短期财务收益。

structure.text: This serves to encourage the trading methodology of a certain kind of investor
who moves in and out of a stock without engaging in constructive dialogue with the company about strategy or performance
without engaging in constructive dialogue with the company about strategy or performance
and is simply seeking a short-term financial gain

difficult_points: This 回指季度报告压力和满足市场数据需求这一机制。
serve to encourage 表示某种机制起到鼓励作用。
who 从句修饰 investor，说明这类投资者的行为特征。
moves... and is seeking... 是同一投资者的两个并列动作。

expressions.text: move in and out of a stock

sentences.sentence: This effect has been made worse by the changing profile of investors due to the globalisation of capital and the increasing use of automated trading systems.
sentences.translation: 由于资本全球化以及自动交易系统使用的增加，投资者构成不断变化，使这种影响变得更加严重。

structure.text: This effect
has been made worse
by the changing profile of investors
due to the globalisation of capital and the increasing use of automated trading systems

difficult_points: has been made worse 是现在完成时的被动结构，表示影响已经被加剧。
by 引出使影响恶化的直接因素，即投资者构成变化。
due to... 说明投资者构成变化背后的原因。
the globalisation of capital 和 the increasing use... 是两个并列原因。

sentences.sentence: Corporate culture adapts and management teams are largely incentivised to meet financial goals.
sentences.translation: 企业文化会随之适应，而管理团队也在很大程度上受到激励去实现财务目标。

structure.text: Corporate culture adapts
and management teams are largely incentivised to meet financial goals
to meet financial goals

difficult_points: adapts 表示企业文化会顺应前文描述的短期市场压力。
are incentivised 是被动语态，说明管理团队受到制度性激励。
to meet financial goals 表示激励的目标。

sentences.sentence: Compensation for chief executives has become a combat zone where pitched battles between investors, management and board members are fought, often behind closed doors but increasingly frequently in the full glare of press attention.
sentences.translation: 首席执行官薪酬已经变成一个交战区，投资者、管理层和董事会成员之间会在这里展开激烈战斗；这些斗争常常在闭门状态下进行，但也越来越频繁地暴露在媒体聚光灯下。

structure.text: Compensation for chief executives
has become a combat zone
where pitched battles between investors, management and board members are fought
often behind closed doors but increasingly frequently in the full glare of press attention

difficult_points: combat zone 和 pitched battles 都是比喻，强调高管薪酬争议激烈。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 combat zone。
are fought 是被动语态，说明战斗在这个议题上展开。
behind closed doors 与 in the full glare of press attention 形成公开程度的对比。

expressions.text: in the full glare of press attention

sentences.sentence: Many would argue that this is in the interest of transparency and good governance as shareholders use their muscle in the area of pay to pressure boards to remove underperforming chief executives.
sentences.translation: 许多人会认为，这符合透明度和良好治理的利益，因为股东在薪酬领域运用自身力量，向董事会施压，要求撤换表现不佳的首席执行官。

structure.text: Many would argue
that this is in the interest of transparency and good governance
as shareholders use their muscle in the area of pay
to pressure boards to remove underperforming chief executives
to remove underperforming chief executives

difficult_points: would argue 表示一种可能的观点，而不是作者直接断言。
this 指前一句高管薪酬争议受到更多关注和博弈。
as 引导原因状语从句，解释为什么有人认为这有利于治理。
to pressure boards to remove... 中第一个不定式表示目的，第二个不定式说明 pressure 的内容。

expressions.meaning_zh: 表现不佳的首席执行官

sentences.sentence: Their powers to vote down executive remuneration policies increased when binding votes came into force.
sentences.translation: 当具有约束力的投票生效后，他们否决高管薪酬政策的权力增加了。

structure.text: Their powers to vote down executive remuneration policies
to vote down executive remuneration policies
increased
when binding votes came into force

difficult_points: Their 回指上一句中的 shareholders。
to vote down... 是不定式短语，说明 powers 的具体内容。
when 从句说明股东权力增加的时间条件。
binding votes 指具有约束力的投票，不只是咨询性投票。

sentences.sentence: The chair of the remuneration committee can be an exposed and lonely role, as Alison Carnwath, chair of Barclays Bank's remuneration committee, found when she had to resign, having been roundly criticised for trying to defend the enormous bonus to be paid to the chief executive; the irony being that she was widely understood to have spoken out against it in the privacy of the committee.
sentences.translation: 薪酬委员会主席可能是一个暴露在外且孤立无援的角色，巴克莱银行薪酬委员会主席艾莉森·卡恩沃思在不得不辞职时就发现了这一点；她因试图为即将支付给首席执行官的巨额奖金辩护而受到严厉批评，而讽刺的是，人们普遍认为她其实曾在委员会私下场合反对过这笔奖金。

structure.text: The chair of the remuneration committee
can be an exposed and lonely role
as Alison Carnwath, chair of Barclays Bank's remuneration committee, found when she had to resign
having been roundly criticised for trying to defend the enormous bonus to be paid to the chief executive
the irony being that she was widely understood to have spoken out against it in the privacy of the committee
that she was widely understood to have spoken out against it in the privacy of the committee

difficult_points: as 从句引入具体案例，说明薪酬委员会主席为何可能孤立而暴露。
chair of Barclays Bank's remuneration committee 是 Alison Carnwath 的同位语。
having been roundly criticised... 是完成式被动分词短语，说明辞职前遭受的批评。
分号后的 the irony being... 是独立主格结构，补充说明事件的讽刺之处。

sentences.sentence: The financial crisis stimulated a debate about the role and purpose of the company and a heightened awareness of corporate ethics.
sentences.translation: 金融危机激发了关于公司角色和目的的讨论，并提高了人们对企业伦理的意识。

structure.text: The financial crisis
stimulated a debate about the role and purpose of the company and a heightened awareness of corporate ethics
about the role and purpose of the company
a heightened awareness of corporate ethics

difficult_points: stimulated 后接两个并列宾语：a debate 和 a heightened awareness。
about... 修饰 debate，说明讨论主题。
heightened awareness 表示危机使企业伦理意识更强。

expressions.text: the role and purpose of the company

sentences.sentence: Trust in the corporation has been eroded and academics such as Michael Sandel, in his thoughtful and bestselling book What Money Can't Buy, are questioning the morality of capitalism and the market economy.
sentences.translation: 人们对公司的信任已经被削弱，而迈克尔·桑德尔等学者也在其深刻且畅销的著作《金钱不能买什么》中质疑资本主义和市场经济的道德性。

structure.text: Trust in the corporation
has been eroded
and academics such as Michael Sandel
in his thoughtful and bestselling book What Money Can't Buy
are questioning the morality of capitalism and the market economy

difficult_points: has been eroded 是现在完成时的被动结构，说明信任已经受到削弱。
such as Michael Sandel 举例说明 academics。
in his... book 是插入性介词短语，说明质疑观点出现的作品。
capitalism and the market economy 是 morality of 的并列对象。

sentences.sentence: Boards of companies in all sectors will need to widen their perspective to encompass these issues and this may involve a realignment of corporate goals.
sentences.translation: 各行业公司的董事会都需要拓宽视角，以涵盖这些问题，而这可能涉及企业目标的重新调整。

structure.text: Boards of companies in all sectors
will need to widen their perspective
to encompass these issues
and this may involve a realignment of corporate goals

difficult_points: in all sectors 修饰 companies，说明适用范围覆盖所有行业。
to encompass... 表示拓宽视角的目的。
this 回指董事会拓宽视角以纳入伦理和公司目的等议题。
realignment 表示目标体系可能需要重新调整。

sentences.sentence: We live in challenging times.
sentences.translation: 我们生活在充满挑战的时代。

structure.text: We
live in challenging times

difficult_points: We 将作者、企业和读者都纳入同一现实背景。
challenging times 概括前文金融危机后公司治理面临的复杂环境。
